changelog.title: The Void
changelog.log:
[Note] Solo run until dead
[Feature] Option to clean inventory with checkbox of items selection
[Note] Set level to exit will be available later

changelog.title: Adventurous
changelog.log:
[Feature] Automatically fill the recommended trait on every map, if no recommended trait found will select random one
[Feature] After every recall, automatically consume all adventure badges (but when no recall clicked on the session, will skip this part)
[Feature] Option to recall only when 0
[Feature] Option to exchange adventure badge for soul shard
[Feature] Option to recruit companion before start

changelog.title: Adventurous
changelog.log: [Update] Adding auto consume mystic pearls after the end of run, wont trigger without run the angelarium. The consume will auto upgrade when the upgrade active

changelog.title: Crystal Ladder
changelog.log:
[Update] Ladder Blitz now change name to Crystal Ladder, becuase in the future will create ladder from 1,50,100,150 (Solo Run)
[Update] Clean Inventory option added
